title: AnimatedIronGolemSpawn
description: Adds an animation when Iron Golems are spawned by villagers defending their village.
body:
Adds an animation when Iron Golems are spawned by **villagers defending their village ONLY**  (or if they are spawned with the scoreboard tag `AnimatedSpawn`).

This plugin **does not** actually change the blocks in the world. The block changes are purely **packet-based (visual)**.

Here's a gif to showcase this useless feature!

![](https://resources.loohpjames.com/spigot/assets/animatedirongolemspawn/1.gif)
